stemHtml: An under-confident and self-effacing co-pilot is promoted to Captain. It is not uncommon for such a person have a behavioural pattern which is:

options.a: easy-going but having a reliance on others.
options.b: easy to adapt to the role of Captain.
options.c: confident and self-assuring because of his/her higher status.
options.d: aggressive if challenged by another member of the crew.
